task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace UI is visible, showing the channel sidebar on the left and the chat area on the right.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the #release-updates channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '#release-updates' channel is highlighted in the left sidebar and its name appears in the top header of the main chat area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the message announcing release 7.10.7.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chat message containing the text '7.10.7' is clearly visible in the main chat area.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the message actions for the target message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message action toolbar (showing icons like reply, react, star) or the three-dots (kebab) menu is visible/opened specifically on the 7.10.7 release message.

task_completion.description: Verify the target message has been starred.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A star icon is highlighted/filled next to the 7.10.7 message, a 'Message starred' toast notification is visible, or the 7.10.7 message appears in the 'Starred Messages' right sidebar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction within the Rocket.Chat web or desktop interface, not terminal windows executing curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the star was applied to the correct, authentic message.
integrity.visual_evidence: The star indicator must be attached specifically to the system-populated message containing '7.10.7', not a different release message or a newly typed fake message.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't fake the task completion using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should not show text editors (like gedit, nano, or notepad) being used to write out the task status or fake the completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Channel: #release-updates. Target Release Tag: 7.10.7. Target Release Date: 2026-01-13. Action Required: Star the message. The VLM must ensure the star action is applied specifically to the authentic message containing '7.10.7' in the #release-updates channel.
